content:
type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
your_files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
note: Both features genuinely need cache.py + __init__.py (Cache.__init__ params, configure_cache signature), so true file-level disjointness isn't possible. Proposing region-level disjointness instead: my edits are additive-only and confined to: (1) cache.py: add TTLCache import, add 'ttl: Optional[int] = None' as a NEW trailing param in Cache.__init__ signature, one conditional branch inside __init__ for memory_cache (TTLCache vs LRUCache), one conditional in put() for disk_cache.set(expire=ttl), one self.disk_cache.expire() call added to the miss branch in get(), and a new module-level set_ttl() function at the bottom of cache.py. (2) __init__.py: add 'ttl: Optional[int] = None' as a NEW trailing param to configure_cache(), pass it through to Cache(...), add 'from dspy.clients.cache import Cache, set_ttl' update, and append 'set_ttl' to __all__. I will NOT touch DSPY_CACHE instantiation logic beyond adding ttl=None, and won't touch compression/eviction code. Please tell me the exact lines/params you plan to add so we avoid overlapping the same signature line - I'll add my param after yours or vice versa, whichever you prefer. Once we know each other's exact insertion points we can both ACCEPT.

content:
type: DONE
my_files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
note: TTL implementation complete and tests passing (15/15 existing cache tests green, plus manual verification of TTL expiry, configure_cache(ttl=), and set_ttl()). Final diff written to patch.txt. Summary of my changes: cachetools import now includes TTLCache; Cache.__init__ gained a trailing 'ttl: Optional[int] = None' param, self.ttl stored, memory_cache uses TTLCache when ttl set else LRUCache; get() calls self.disk_cache.expire() on a miss when ttl is set; put() uses self.disk_cache.set(key, value, expire=self.ttl) when ttl is set else plain __setitem__; added module-level set_ttl(seconds) at the bottom of cache.py that mutates the live dspy.cache instance in place (preserves other settings) rather than reconstructing via configure_cache. __init__.py: configure_cache() gained trailing 'ttl' param passed through to Cache(...), DSPY_CACHE now passes ttl=None explicitly, set_ttl imported and added to __all__. As noted earlier, my repo copy shows none of your compress/eviction changes, so no actual overlap occurred on my end. Good luck with your feature!
